race.comment: KINGSBRAE TED (4) could not have been more impressive last start in his a dynamic 17.19 win at this track over 300m. Hard to top on the time from last start. RIPPED RACCOON (7) was last seen when rocketing around 300m at this track in 17.09 for a 5.5 lengths win. Top win latest and can measure up again. VELOCITY YIN (1) was responsible for a modest effort most recently when eighth at Q Lakeside over 352m behind Aston Alight (20.22) in a Grade 4/5. Safe beginner who draws ideally on the inside. Cannot be underestimated. MAJESTIC TYSON (2) is in the mix after placing here at this trip last time out.
